The Real Challenges

settings.title: What Most Functional Medicine Practices Are Up Against

settings.editor: These aren't marketing problems. They're systems problems — and each one has a proven fix.

settings.html:
Challenge 01

Poor Online Visibility

Your site sits on page 2 or 3 of Google while competitors with less expertise dominate search. Patients can't find you — even when they're actively searching for what you offer.

Challenge 02

Unpredictable Patient Flow

Referrals are unreliable. One week you're slammed, the next you're wondering how to make payroll. Without a system, lead flow stays inconsistent and stressful.

Challenge 03

No Time for Marketing

You became a practitioner to heal people. Running ads, managing social media, and figuring out SEO wasn't the plan. You need systems that work without your constant attention.
The SCALE SEO Framework

settings.title: The Proven System for Functional Medicine SEO

settings.editor: Five interconnected pillars that take a functional medicine or naturopathic practice from invisible to in-demand. Each layer builds on the last — infrastructure first, then content, authority, lift, and evaluation.

settings.html:
“The SCALE SEO Framework: The proven system that helps functional medicine practices dominate their local market and consistently attract high-value patients.”

— Mike Kohl, Health Biz Scale

tabs.tab_content:
S — Site Infrastructure

The technical foundation every functional medicine practice website needs before any content or links will move the needle. A well-structured site signals authority to Google from day one.

Learn About Our SEO Services →
XML Sitemaps & crawl optimization
Strategic internal linking architecture
Core Web Vitals & site speed
Technical SEO audit & fixes
Mobile responsiveness (60%+ of health searches)
Schema markup (LocalBusiness, Medical, FAQ)

C — Content Engine

AI-assisted content at scale — blog posts, service pages, programmatic location content, and interactive tools — all optimized for functional medicine and naturopathic search terms.

Browse Free Resources →
AI SEO landing pages
Programmatic content at scale
Interactive tools & symptom trackers
Blog articles & topical clusters
Service & specialty pages
Location pages (city/region targeting)

A — Authority Links

Build the off-page signals that tell Google your practice is trusted and credible — through medical directories, PR mentions, guest posts, and genuine social authority.

See Our Link Strategy →
High-authority backlink acquisition
Social link signals & brand mentions
Medical journals & authority citations
Industry directory submissions
Strategic guest posts on health sites
PR placements & media mentions

L — Lift Rankings

Ongoing optimization to climb and hold top positions — improving click-through rates, refreshing content, targeting featured snippets and Google AI Overviews for maximum visibility.

How We Lift Your Rankings →
Strategic internal link improvements
CTR optimization (meta titles & descriptions)
Content rewrites & refreshes
Content depth expansion
Keyword clustering & optimization
SERP feature & AI Overview targeting

E — Evaluate Results

Data-driven reporting on what's working, what to optimize, and exactly what each patient is costing you to acquire — so every decision is grounded in real ROI, not guesswork.

Get a Free Practice Audit →
Conversion rate optimization (CRO)
Traffic source analysis
Keyword rank tracking
ROI & revenue attribution
Patient acquisition cost analysis
A/B testing & landing page experiments

Retention = your highest ROI

About Mike Kohl

settings.title: 20 Years Building Systems That Scale to $500M

settings.editor:
Before working with functional medicine practitioners, Mike spent 20 years building sales and marketing systems for large companies — scaling one from zero to half a billion dollars per year.

His shift came when conventional medicine failed his own family. That journey into functional health became a mission: combining deep technology and systems expertise with a genuine passion for functional medicine — to help clinics like yours grow without the chaos.

Common Questions

Questions About Growing Your Practice

tabs.tab_title: What makes the SCALE SEO Framework different from standard SEO?
tabs.tab_content: Standard SEO is generic. The SCALE Framework is built specifically for functional medicine and naturopathic practices — covering the trust signals, schema types, content topics, and local strategies that move the needle in healthcare. It also incorporates AI Overview optimization, which most agencies haven't touched yet.

tabs.tab_title: I've tried other marketing companies and got nothing. Why would this be different?
tabs.tab_content: Most agencies apply generic healthcare marketing to functional medicine practices — it doesn't work because the patient journey, trust dynamics, and search intent are completely different. We exclusively serve functional medicine and naturopathic practitioners, and every system we build is designed around how your patients actually search, decide, and book.

tabs.tab_title: Can I implement these systems myself or do I need to hire you?
tabs.tab_content: Both. The free resources and playbook are designed for practitioners who want to implement themselves. For those who want it done-for-you, we handle everything from setup to optimization. Most clients choose the done-for-you path because their time is better spent on patient care.

tabs.tab_title: How long before I start seeing results from SEO?
tabs.tab_content: Google Maps ranking typically moves within 30 days. Organic SEO results compound — most clients see meaningful traffic increases within 60–90 days, with consistent growth through month 6. The niche terms we target (functional medicine SEO keywords) have very low competition, which means faster movement than typical healthcare SEO timelines.

tabs.tab_title: Do you work with naturopathic and integrative medicine practices too?
tabs.tab_content: Absolutely. The SMART and SCALE systems were designed to work across functional medicine, naturopathic medicine, and integrative health practices. The patient acquisition principles are the same — the keyword targeting and content strategy adapt to your specific specialty and local market.
